briefdescription.para: Return resolution bits in CFGR register RES[1:0] field.

parameterdescription.para: ADC handle
of bitfield RES in CFGR register.

briefdescription.para: Clear ADC error code (set it to no error code "HAL_ADC_ERROR_NONE").

parameterdescription.para: ADC handle

memberdef.name: ADC_IS_ENABLE

briefdescription.para: Verification of ADC state: enabled or disabled.

parameterdescription.para: ADC handle
(ADC enabled) or RESET (ADC disabled)

briefdescription.para: Check if conversion is on going on regular group.

parameterdescription.para: ADC handle
"0" (no conversion is on going) or value "1" (conversion is on going)

briefdescription.para: Simultaneously clear and set specific bits of the handle State.

simplesect.para: ADC_STATE_CLR_SET() macro is merely aliased to generic macro MODIFY_REG(), the first parameter is the ADC handle State, the second parameter is the bit field to clear, the third and last parameter is the bit field to set.

briefdescription.para: Verify that a given value is aligned with the ADC resolution range.

parameterdescription.para: ADC resolution (12, 10, 8 or 6 bits).
value checked against the resolution.
(ADC_VALUE in line with RESOLUTION) or RESET (ADC_VALUE not in line with RESOLUTION)

briefdescription.para: Verify the length of the scheduled regular conversions group.

parameterdescription.para: number of programmed conversions.
(LENGTH is within the maximum number of possible programmable regular conversions) or RESET (LENGTH is null or too large)

briefdescription.para: Verify the number of scheduled regular conversions in discontinuous mode.

parameterdescription.para: number of scheduled regular conversions in discontinuous mode.
(NUMBER is within the maximum number of regular conversions in discontinuous mode) or RESET (NUMBER is null or too large)

memberdef.name: IS_ADC_CLOCKPRESCALER
memberdef.initializer: (((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_SYNC_PCLK_DIV1) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_SYNC_PCLK_DIV2) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_SYNC_PCLK_DIV4) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV1) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV2) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV4) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV6) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV8) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV10) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV12) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV16) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV32) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV64) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV128) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV256) )

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC clock setting.

parameterdescription.para: programmed ADC clock.
(ADC_CLOCK is a valid value) or RESET (ADC_CLOCK is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC resolution setting.

parameterdescription.para: programmed ADC resolution.
(RESOLUTION is a valid value) or RESET (RESOLUTION is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC resolution setting when limited to 6 or 8 bits.

parameterdescription.para: programmed ADC resolution when limited to 6 or 8 bits.
(RESOLUTION is a valid value) or RESET (RESOLUTION is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC converted data alignment.

parameterdescription.para: programmed ADC converted data alignment.
(ALIGN is a valid value) or RESET (ALIGN is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC scan mode.

parameterdescription.para: programmed ADC scan mode.
(SCAN_MODE is valid) or RESET (SCAN_MODE is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC edge trigger setting for regular group.

parameterdescription.para: programmed ADC edge trigger setting.
(EDGE is a valid value) or RESET (EDGE is invalid)

memberdef.name: IS_ADC_EXTTRIG
memberdef.initializer: (((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T1_CC1) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T1_CC2) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T1_CC3) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T2_CC2) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T3_TRGO) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T4_CC4) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_EXT_IT11) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T8_TRGO) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T8_TRGO2) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T1_TRGO) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T1_TRGO2) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T2_TRGO) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T4_TRGO) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T6_TRGO) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T15_TRGO) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T3_CC4) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_SOFTWARE_START) )

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC regular conversions external trigger.

parameterdescription.para: ADC handle
programmed ADC regular conversions external trigger.
(REGTRIG is a valid value) or RESET (REGTRIG is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC regular conversions check for converted data availability.

parameterdescription.para: converted data availability check.
(EOC_SELECTION is a valid value) or RESET (EOC_SELECTION is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC regular conversions overrun handling.

parameterdescription.para: ADC regular conversions overrun handling.
(OVR is a valid value) or RESET (OVR is invalid)

memberdef.name: IS_ADC_SAMPLE_TIME
memberdef.initializer: (((__TIME__) == ADC_SAMPLETIME_2CYCLES_5) || \ ((__TIME__) == ADC_SAMPLETIME_6CYCLES_5) || \ ((__TIME__) == ADC_SAMPLETIME_12CYCLES_5) || \ ((__TIME__) == ADC_SAMPLETIME_24CYCLES_5) || \ ((__TIME__) == ADC_SAMPLETIME_47CYCLES_5) || \ ((__TIME__) == ADC_SAMPLETIME_92CYCLES_5) || \ ((__TIME__) == ADC_SAMPLETIME_247CYCLES_5) || \ ((__TIME__) == ADC_SAMPLETIME_640CYCLES_5) )

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC conversions sampling time.

parameterdescription.para: ADC conversions sampling time.
(TIME is a valid value) or RESET (TIME is invalid)

memberdef.name: IS_ADC_REGULAR_RANK
memberdef.initializer: (((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_1 ) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_2 ) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_3 ) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_4 ) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_5 ) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_6 ) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_7 ) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_8 ) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_9 ) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_10) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_11) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_12) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_13) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_14) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_15) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_16) )

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC regular channel setting.

parameterdescription.para: programmed ADC regular channel.
(CHANNEL is valid) or RESET (CHANNEL is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Return resolution bits in CFGR register RES[1:0] field.

parameterdescription.para: ADC handle
of bitfield RES in CFGR register.

briefdescription.para: Clear ADC error code (set it to no error code "HAL_ADC_ERROR_NONE").

parameterdescription.para: ADC handle

memberdef.name: ADC_IS_ENABLE

briefdescription.para: Verification of ADC state: enabled or disabled.

parameterdescription.para: ADC handle
(ADC enabled) or RESET (ADC disabled)

briefdescription.para: Check if conversion is on going on regular group.

parameterdescription.para: ADC handle
"0" (no conversion is on going) or value "1" (conversion is on going)

briefdescription.para: Simultaneously clear and set specific bits of the handle State.

simplesect.para: ADC_STATE_CLR_SET() macro is merely aliased to generic macro MODIFY_REG(), the first parameter is the ADC handle State, the second parameter is the bit field to clear, the third and last parameter is the bit field to set.

briefdescription.para: Verify that a given value is aligned with the ADC resolution range.

parameterdescription.para: ADC resolution (12, 10, 8 or 6 bits).
value checked against the resolution.
(ADC_VALUE in line with RESOLUTION) or RESET (ADC_VALUE not in line with RESOLUTION)

briefdescription.para: Verify the length of the scheduled regular conversions group.

parameterdescription.para: number of programmed conversions.
(LENGTH is within the maximum number of possible programmable regular conversions) or RESET (LENGTH is null or too large)

briefdescription.para: Verify the number of scheduled regular conversions in discontinuous mode.

parameterdescription.para: number of scheduled regular conversions in discontinuous mode.
(NUMBER is within the maximum number of regular conversions in discontinuous mode) or RESET (NUMBER is null or too large)

memberdef.name: IS_ADC_CLOCKPRESCALER
memberdef.initializer: (((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_SYNC_PCLK_DIV1) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_SYNC_PCLK_DIV2) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_SYNC_PCLK_DIV4) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV1) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV2) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV4) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV6) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV8) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV10) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV12) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV16) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV32) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV64) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV128) || \ ((__ADC_CLOCK__) == ADC_CLOCK_ASYNC_DIV256) )

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC clock setting.

parameterdescription.para: programmed ADC clock.
(ADC_CLOCK is a valid value) or RESET (ADC_CLOCK is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC resolution setting.

parameterdescription.para: programmed ADC resolution.
(RESOLUTION is a valid value) or RESET (RESOLUTION is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC resolution setting when limited to 6 or 8 bits.

parameterdescription.para: programmed ADC resolution when limited to 6 or 8 bits.
(RESOLUTION is a valid value) or RESET (RESOLUTION is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC converted data alignment.

parameterdescription.para: programmed ADC converted data alignment.
(ALIGN is a valid value) or RESET (ALIGN is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC scan mode.

parameterdescription.para: programmed ADC scan mode.
(SCAN_MODE is valid) or RESET (SCAN_MODE is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC edge trigger setting for regular group.

parameterdescription.para: programmed ADC edge trigger setting.
(EDGE is a valid value) or RESET (EDGE is invalid)

memberdef.name: IS_ADC_EXTTRIG
memberdef.initializer: (((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T1_CC1) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T1_CC2) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T1_CC3) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T2_CC2) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T3_TRGO) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T4_CC4) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_EXT_IT11) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T8_TRGO) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T8_TRGO2) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T1_TRGO) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T1_TRGO2) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T2_TRGO) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T4_TRGO) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T6_TRGO) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T15_TRGO) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_EXTERNALTRIG_T3_CC4) || \ ((__REGTRIG__) == ADC_SOFTWARE_START) )

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC regular conversions external trigger.

parameterdescription.para: ADC handle
programmed ADC regular conversions external trigger.
(REGTRIG is a valid value) or RESET (REGTRIG is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC regular conversions check for converted data availability.

parameterdescription.para: converted data availability check.
(EOC_SELECTION is a valid value) or RESET (EOC_SELECTION is invalid)

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC regular conversions overrun handling.

parameterdescription.para: ADC regular conversions overrun handling.
(OVR is a valid value) or RESET (OVR is invalid)

memberdef.name: IS_ADC_SAMPLE_TIME
memberdef.initializer: (((__TIME__) == ADC_SAMPLETIME_2CYCLES_5) || \ ((__TIME__) == ADC_SAMPLETIME_6CYCLES_5) || \ ((__TIME__) == ADC_SAMPLETIME_12CYCLES_5) || \ ((__TIME__) == ADC_SAMPLETIME_24CYCLES_5) || \ ((__TIME__) == ADC_SAMPLETIME_47CYCLES_5) || \ ((__TIME__) == ADC_SAMPLETIME_92CYCLES_5) || \ ((__TIME__) == ADC_SAMPLETIME_247CYCLES_5) || \ ((__TIME__) == ADC_SAMPLETIME_640CYCLES_5) )

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC conversions sampling time.

parameterdescription.para: ADC conversions sampling time.
(TIME is a valid value) or RESET (TIME is invalid)

memberdef.name: IS_ADC_REGULAR_RANK
memberdef.initializer: (((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_1 ) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_2 ) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_3 ) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_4 ) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_5 ) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_6 ) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_7 ) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_8 ) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_9 ) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_10) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_11) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_12) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_13) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_14) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_15) || \ ((__CHANNEL__) == ADC_REGULAR_RANK_16) )

briefdescription.para: Verify the ADC regular channel setting.

parameterdescription.para: programmed ADC regular channel.
(CHANNEL is valid) or RESET (CHANNEL is invalid)
